summary: Iteration 4 testing complete — all new backend endpoints (public /api/dishes, /api/specials, PATCH /reservations/{id}/status, PATCH /admin/dishes/{id}, PATCH /admin/specials/{id}), Twilio graceful fallback, and admin UI (StatusControl, Menu CMS, Specials CMS) verified. 16/16 backend pytest passes and all frontend flows work.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 627 lines — approaching 700 threshold. Consider splitting routes/models/services into modules (routes/admin.py, routes/public.py, services/twilio.py, services/email.py).

PATCH /admin/dishes/{id} treats explicit null as 'no change' (uses `v is not None` filter). This is fine but means clients can't clear a nullable field. Acceptable since none of the fields are nullable.
Brute-force IP detection still uses request.client.host in login (not X-Forwarded-For) — carried over from prior iteration; unresolved.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_-prefixed reservations via public POST; status changed and restored to pending. Dish prices/active toggles restored to originals. Special title/price restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully passed. Verified: 15 dishes/3 specials seeded; sorted by sort_order; PATCH status validation (400 for invalid, 401 no auth, 404 not found); dish price update reflects on GET /api/dishes; active=false hides from public; empty PATCH body returns 400; admin/stats.reservations_pending present; Twilio logs 'Twilio not configured — skipping reservation SMS/WhatsApp.' on each reservation. Frontend: 4 stat cards, StatusControl badges update in-place with toast, 15 dish editor cards with per-field data-testid='field-<key>-<id>' and save-<id>/toggle-active-<id> buttons work, 3 specials CMS cards work.
